name: South of the Border Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Canned red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook onion in oil.
2. Stir in chili powder, cumin, garlic, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
3. Cool mixture.
4. Stir in beans, rice, cheese, milk, and eggs.
5. Spray a 10-inch microwave-safe pie plate with nonstick spray.
6. Add the rice mixture to the pie plate.
7. Cook on 50% power for 22-24 minutes or until the center is just set. Turn the dish a quarter turn twice during cooking.
8. Let stand for 10 minutes.
9. Garnish with chopped green pepper and serve with salsa if desired.
